name: Checkout UI Layout Verification

metadata.business_goal: Verify that checkout page layout is correct and all elements are positioned as designed

preconditions: User is logged in to the app
Cart contains at least one item
User is on the checkout page

steps.action: Confirm order summary shows correct item
steps.expected_result: Item name and price are shown in order summary

steps.action: Visually verify the page layout matches approved design
steps.expected_result: Page layout matches the approved design mockup

risks.risk: Design changes may not be reflected in test expectations
risks.mitigation: Update expected screenshots on each design revision
